desc1: YASBe helps import-export businesses overcome settlement delays, manage currency risk, and operate with greater financial control
crossBorderComplexityDelayedSettlementsA: Cross-border complexity, delayed settlements, and currency risks are common hurdles—here’s what global trade teams face every day.
multipleCurrenciesInvolvedInPaymentsAndS: Multiple currencies involved in payments and settlements. Delays in cross-border transfers due to banking hours, correspondent banking inefficiencies, and currency conversion.
slowAccessToFundsTiedUpInInternationalBa: Slow access to funds tied up in international bank accounts, impacting working capital. Difficulty in forecasting and managing liquidity across global markets.
exposureToExchangeRateFluctuationsCanRes: Exposure to exchange rate fluctuations can result in unpredictable costs for suppliers and buyers.
complexitiesInReconcilingPaymentsAndColl: Complexities in reconciling payments and collections from different currencies and jurisdictions.
virtualAccountsSimplifyingPaymentFlowsAn: Virtual Accounts: Simplifying Payment Flows and Enhancing Control
globalCollectionPayoutBridgingTheGapBetw: Global Collection & Payout: Bridging the Gap Between Markets
stablecoinCheckInstantSettlementsAndBord: Stablecoin Check: Instant Settlements and Borderless Transactions
issueAccountsInYourBusinessSNameInMultip: • Issue accounts in your business’s name in multiple currencies (EUR, GBP, USD), eliminating the need to open multiple bank accounts in each region.
trackFundsByProjectOrSectorGivingGreater: • Track funds by project or sector, giving greater clarity on cash flow and simplifying financial reporting.
segmentAndIsolateFundsForDifferentCustom: • Segment and isolate funds for different customers, suppliers, or regions, reducing risk exposure and enabling better cash flow management.
streamlineReconciliationByHavingAllColle: • Streamline reconciliation by having all collections and payments routed through dedicated virtual accounts.
collectPaymentsFromCustomersInLocalCurre: • Collect payments from customers in local currencies and make payouts to suppliers and partners worldwide through a unified platform.
reduceTheComplexityAndCostOfTraditionalC: • Reduce the complexity and cost of traditional cross-border payments by leveraging local payment networks, thus lowering fees and speeding up transactions.
accessFundsMoreQuicklyMakingItEasierToSe: • Access funds more quickly, making it easier to settle supplier invoices and pay customs duties or taxes on time.
instantAccessToFunds24x7AvoidingDelaysTi: • Instant access to funds 24x7, avoiding delays tied to traditional banking systems and cut-off times.
convertStablecoinsToFiatAtYourConvenienc: • Convert Stablecoins to fiat at your convenience, either to a company-owned account or to a third-party bank account.
avoidExchangeRateVolatilityAsStablecoins: • Avoid exchange rate volatility, as Stablecoins are pegged to fiat currencies like USD or EUR, ensuring predictable payment values.
enableCustomersAndSuppliersWorldwideToPa: • Enable customers and suppliers worldwide to pay and settle in Stablecoins, reducing cross-border transaction delays and disputes.

withHoneybeesGlobalCollectionPayoutServi: With Honeybee’s Global Collection & Payout services, import and export companies can:
honeybeeAllowsCompaniesToAcceptStablecoi: Honeybee allows companies to accept Stablecoin payments (e.g., USDT, USDC, EURC), offering multiple benefits:
virtualAccountsInMultipleCurrenciesForSe: Virtual Accounts in multiple currencies for seamless collections and payouts
nearInstantSettlementsWithStablecoinChec: Near-instant settlements with Stablecoin checkout, allowing quicker access to working capital
dedicatedVirtualAccountsForEachRegionSim: Dedicated virtual accounts for each region, simplifying accounting processes
easyAccessToLocalPaymentRailsAndFiatOffR: Easy access to local payment rails and fiat off-ramps across borders
stablecoinsPeggedToFiatReduceVolatilityI: Stablecoins pegged to fiat reduce volatility in international transactions
anImportCompanyBasedInTheUsExpandsOperat: An import company based in the US expands operations in South America and Africa, using YASBe to simplify payout and collections, and reduce the time and cost involved in transferring funds across borders.
aHongKongBasedExporterOfElectronicsAdopt: A Hong Kong-based exporter of electronics adopts Stablecoin checkout to accept payments from global clients, enabling them to instantly settle transactions across time zones and reinvest in new inventory without waiting for bank processing.
anECommerceCompanyConsolidatesSupplierPa: An e-commerce company consolidates supplier payments and customer collections across APAC, EMEA, and the Americas, using YASBe to streamline treasury operations while reducing FX and bank fees.
